decision: Renamed nc-750-map.md → nc-750-master-plan.md and nc-750-challenge.md → nc-750-review.md; updated all stale terminology (brief→phase plan, nc-750-challenge→nc-750-review, nc-750-map→nc-750-master-plan, already-challenged→already-reviewed) across all five .claude agent files.
alternative_not_taken: Leaving agent file names as-is while only fixing body text — rejected because the file name is the agent's identity in Claude Code; a file named nc-750-map.md would spawn an agent named nc-750-map regardless of body content.
rationale: Agent files are the other half of the skill↔agent pair; canonical naming must be consistent throughout or the orchestrator's tool invocations and the skill-loading instructions diverge.
